A

acceptSnowplow(Snowplow) - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Node
Accepts a snowplow into the node's resting area.
acceptVehicle(Vehicle) - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Lane
Accepts a vehicle onto the lane if the surface allows it.
addAmount(int) - Method in class org.skeleton.resource.Resource
 
addCar(Car) - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Map
Adds a car to the map.
addEquipment(Snowplow, String) - Method in class org.skeleton.player.Player
Adds equipment to a specific snowplow.
addGravel(int) - Method in class org.skeleton.Inventory
Increases the amount of gravel in the inventory.
addHead(PlowHead) - Method in class org.skeleton.Inventory
Adds a plow head to the inventory.
addKerosene(int) - Method in class org.skeleton.Inventory
Increases the amount of kerosene in the inventory.
addMoney(int) - Method in class org.skeleton.player.Player
Adds money to the player's balance.
addNode(Node) - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Map
Adds a node to the map.
addResource(Resource, int) - Method in class org.skeleton.Inventory
Adds a specified resource to the inventory.
addResource(Resource, int) - Method in class org.skeleton.player.Snowplow
Adds a resource to the snowplow's inventory.
addRoad(Road) - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Map
Adds a road to the map.
addRoad(Road) - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Node
Connects a road to this node.
addSalt(int) - Method in class org.skeleton.Inventory
Increases the amount of salt in the inventory.
addScore(int) - Method in class org.skeleton.player.Player
Adds to the player's score.
addSnow(int) - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Lane
Adds snow to the lane, accounting for salt and gravel.
addSnowplow(Snowplow) - Method in class org.skeleton.player.Player
Adds a snowplow to the player's collection.
amount - Variable in class org.skeleton.resource.Resource
 
ask(String) - Static method in class org.skeleton.Questioner
Asks a yes/no question on the console.

Game - Class in org.skeleton
Controller class for the snowplow game.

Generates the map layout (e.g., by reading from a file).

Gets the list of cars on the map.
getCurrentHead() - Method in class org.skeleton.player.Snowplow
Gets the currently active plow head.
getCurrentLane() - Method in class org.skeleton.vehicle.Vehicle
Visszaadja a sávot, ahol a jármű tartózkodik.
getCurrentNode() - Method in class org.skeleton.vehicle.Vehicle
Visszaadja a csomópontot, ahol a jármű tartózkodik (ha épp egy csomóponton van).
getInventory() - Method in class org.skeleton.player.Snowplow
Gets the snowplow's inventory.
getLanes() - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Road
Gets the list of lanes on this road.
getMoney() - Method in class org.skeleton.player.Player
Gets the player's current balance.
getName() - Method in class org.skeleton.player.Player
Gets the player's name.
getNeighbors() - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Node
Gets the list of roads connected to this node.
getOtherEnd(Node) - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Road
Gets the node at the other end of the road relative to the given node.
getRoad() - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Lane
Gets the road this lane belongs to.
getRoads() - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Map
Gets the list of roads in the map.
getScore() - Method in class org.skeleton.player.Player
Gets the player's current score.
getShop() - Method in class org.skeleton.Game
Gets the equipment shop.
getShortestPath(Node, Node) - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Map
Finds the first lane of the first road on the shortest path between two nodes.
getSnowThickness() - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Lane
Gets the current snow thickness.
getSurface() - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Lane
Gets the current surface of the lane.
getTrampleCount() - Method in class org.skeleton.map.Lane
Gets the trample count.
